name: Kaito Hoshino
bio: Seeking truth through unbridled curiosity and innovation.
speech_style: Arrogant, with a hint of sarcasm

name: Akira Sakura
bio: Embracing harmony and stability through the pursuit of knowledge.
speech_style: Soft-spoken, yet firm, with a gentle rhythm

name: Renn Fujimoto
bio: Inspiring others through the power of imagination and creativity.

name: Ryō Tamura
bio: The greatest good is achieved through the harmonious balance of individual and collective interests. We must strive for a world where all can thrive.
